productDisplayName: Timberland Women Casual Pink Casual Shoes
description: Get vibrant this winter with colourful and comfortable slip-ons. The timberland Performance Pinkham Notch Mary Jane slip-on shoe is a great addition to your wardrobe. With a breathable and environment friendly PET mesh lining and anti-fungal footbed, it's a healthy buy for you and the environment.UpperSlip-on style for comfortPremium suede upper with nubuck innerling at the heel, and rubber foxing at the forefoot for absolute durability, comfort and stylePrinted 100% recycled PET inner lining for breathability and environment protectionElasticated fabric knit strap on the forefoot to hold the foot in placeMidsolePlastic and fabric midsole for durability and stabilityRemovable anti-fungi cushioned footbed for all-day comfort and supportOutsoleDurable Green Rubber outsole made of 42% recycled rubber Leaf-styled lugs on the forefoot and lateral midfoot, with traingular grooved lugs on the medial forefoot and semi-circular grooves on the heel for maximum traction Shoe careUse a suede brush to clean surfaceDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
